# Portal App: Learn Content => color of the h1 tag

@mxmrtns: With the blue logo primary color inside the home feature sections, I think it is a good idea to also adjust the h1 tags inside the learning content.

before: 
![Screenshot 2024-10-01 at 21 54 48](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1dafc3b5-40f6-452d-8159-1ae8918fe5dc)

after:
![Screenshot 2024-10-01 at 22 08 31](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/476d7e0e-376f-44d4-b7a6-5688b7ce38fc)

let me know in case you disagree please :)

best regards tobi

i will also update the h1 tag generation here to add the `neo-h1` class.
